page_metadata.bioconda__summary: SGA - String Graph Assembler. SGA is a de novo assembler for DNA sequence reads. It is based on Gene Myers string graph formulation of assembly and uses the FM-index/Burrows-Wheeler transform to efficiently find overlaps between sequence reads.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Sga is a de novo assembler designed to assemble large genomes from high coverage short read data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: SGA is a de novo assembler designed to assemble large genomes from high coverage short read data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SGA is a de novo assembler designed to assemble large genomes from high coverage short read data.
